say: Pathfinder here -- final year, launch mode. First time we're talking and time is tight, so let's cut straight to what gets you across the line.

sayByAnswer.fallback: Pathfinder here -- final year, launch mode. First time we're talking and time is tight, so let's cut straight to what gets you across the line.

map.CSE: Pathfinder here -- final year CSE, launch mode. Placements are live and time is tight. Let's aim your prep where it wins offers, fast.
map.ECE: Pathfinder here -- final year ECE. Placements, GATE results, core offers -- lots in the air. Let's focus your final push where it counts.
map.EEE: Pathfinder here -- final year EEE. PSU lists, core drives, software offers. Let's cut to what gets you placed fastest.
map.Civil: Pathfinder here -- final year Civil. Core drives, GATE/IES, site offers. Let's focus your last stretch where it converts.
map.Mechanical: Pathfinder here -- final year Mechanical. Core drives, GATE, design roles. Let's aim your final prep where it lands the offer.

say: Fast one -- what's the target you want to walk out of this year with? A role, a company, an offer number... say it plain.
Placement crunch time -- where do you stand on offers, or what interview prep do you need most right now?
First things first -- how close is your next big interview or test?
Which round worries you the most right now? No judgment -- that's where we aim the prep.
And the scoreboard -- how many offers are in hand right now?
Smart players keep a plan B warm. What's yours if placements run long?

sayByAnswer.fallback: Smart players keep a plan B warm. What's yours if placements run long?

map.0: Okay -- sprint mode. We close the gap fast, but smart sprinters keep a plan B warm. What's yours?
map.1: One offer banked -- breathe, you're safe. Now we aim higher; what's your plan B while we do?
map.2+: 2+ offers? You're negotiating now, not applying -- we'll talk leverage. Still, what's your fallback lane?

say: Mock interviews -- how many have you actually sat through?
What kind of place are you aiming at? It changes how we prep the last mile.
How many hours a week can you throw at prep from here to the finish?
Last one, since time's tight -- where does higher studies sit for you right now?
You've come a long way since {answers.goal}. Here's your final-stretch roadmap -- let's get you across the line.
Final stretch. Looking back at everything -- {answers.goal}. {roadmapProgress}How's the placement season treating you?

say: The scoreboard -- how many offers are in hand right now?
Which round is still worrying you the most right now?
Mock interviews since we last spoke -- how many have you sat through?
Re-test: your target was "{answers.goal}". Still the same, or has it shifted?
Welcome back! {roadmapProgress}Your final-stretch roadmap's right where you left it -- keep drilling your weak rounds and mocks. I'll run a full check-in at your next 14-day mark.
